name: Ginger-Chicken Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine 1/4 cup broth, soy sauce, garlic and minced gingerroot; set aside.
2. In a medium saucepan, combine remaining broth, water and bouillon cube. Bring to a boil over high heat; reduce heat until mixture barely simmers. Crush bouillon cube with back of a spoon. Stir until bouillon cube is completely dissolved. Cover; simmer 5 minutes.
3. Meanwhile, peel and thinly slice gingerroot piece; add to hot broth mixture. Cover; simmer over low heat for 15 minutes.
4. Add tofu to soy-ginger marinade, turning to coat all sides. Let marinate for 15 minutes.
5. Using a slotted spoon, remove and discard sliced gingerroot from bouillon mixture.
6. Add spinach to simmering broth; add sherry, if desired. Simmer for 1 minute longer.
7. Remove tofu from marinade. Place 1 marinated tofu slice into each of four soup bowls. Ladle 3/4 cup hot broth mixture into each bowl.
